hints: Complemento: el vestido de talla incorrecta

correctSentence: If only she had returned the wrong size dress yesterday at the store.

hints: Complemento: los precios antes de cobrar

correctSentence: If only the cashier did not ignore the prices before charging customers.

correctSentence: If only I had not bought that expensive brand at the mall yesterday.
